summary: Frontend-only stabilization PASS. All 17 test cases from the review_request green: (1) GET / renders AgentsPage with data-testid='page-agents' + 'agents-greeting' (NOT a placeholder). (2) GET /agents alias also renders AgentsPage and shows the identical surface. (3) Sidebar nav-home AND nav-agents BOTH show active styling (text-primary class present) on both / and /agents. (4) All 8 other sidebar routes navigate correctly: /campaigns, /push, /flows, /instagram, /segments, /audience, /analytics, /settings. (5) Agent Home surface fully renders: 4 KPIs (revenue/total_orders/unique_users/active_flows), Meet the Team (aryan/meera/rishi/dev/priya), 4 Intelligence Cards (aryan/meera/rishi/dev), Ask AI Bar (input/send/suggestions), 2 Scheduled Reports, Task Board with all 4 tabs (awaiting/ongoing/scheduled/completed) — every tab click switches content with no errors. (6) Clicking team-card-aryan opens AgentDetailModal (agent-modal-aryan) and closes cleanly via Escape. (7) Clicking intel-card-primary-* opens the Conversation Panel (data-testid='conversation-panel'). (8) Floating ai-widget-pill present on both / and /flows. (9) Undefined route /this-route-does-not-exist renders the 404 page (data-testid='page-not-found' + visible '404'/'not found' copy) — NOT the ErrorBoundary fallback. (10) ErrorBoundary fallback (data-testid='error-boundary-fallback') is NOT rendered on healthy / — only present in bundle, will mount on child throw. (11) ZERO console errors on /, /agents, /campaigns, /flows after page load + 2s settle (filtered ResizeObserver + resource hints). ErrorBoundary + global unhandledrejection/error listeners + ?? [] guards all in place per files_of_reference.

issues: team-card-kavya is NOT rendered while the seeded agents list (from iteration_4) has 6 agents including 'kavya'. The review_request spec only mandates 'aryan ... priya' so this is not a blocker, but worth confirming whether kavya is intentionally hidden from the public Meet The Team strip or simply missed.

action_items: OPTIONAL: confirm whether 'kavya' should appear in Meet the Team (rendered=5/6 seeded agents). Not in spec, not blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoundary.jsx is well-scoped: uses getDerivedStateFromError + componentDidCatch with console.error, exposes data-testid='error-boundary-fallback' AND data-testid='error-boundary-retry' + '...-home', and the Reset performs window.location.reload() which is the right safety net.

/app/frontend/src/components/layout/AppShell.jsx correctly wraps <Outlet/> in <ErrorBoundary/> so a page-level throw is contained while TopBar/Sidebar/AiWidgetPill stay alive — verified visually (sidebar + topbar persist on 404 page too).
/app/frontend/src/index.js registers both window 'unhandledrejection' AND 'error' listeners with eslint-safe console.error — clean.

/app/frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.jsx pattern is solid: matchPaths + forcedActive computed BEFORE NavLink isActive, so both Home and AI Agents light up on / AND /agents. The end={route === '/'} flag prevents the Home pill from matching every nested route.

/app/frontend/src/App.js declares `<Route path='/' element={<AgentsPage/>} />` and `<Route path='/agents' element={<AgentsPage/>} />` so both URLs literally mount the same component — correct back-compat alias. NotFound route at path='*' captures everything else.

MINOR (carried over from iteration_4): React Flow warning about non-memoized nodeTypes/edgeTypes still fires on /flows/builder/* (cosmetic). Radix Dialog missing aria-describedby also still present on ConversationPanel. Neither blocks Phase P0 stabilization.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 17/17 review_request test items PASS, zero console errors on /, /agents, /campaigns, /flows

seed_data_creation: None — used live seed (agents/intel/reports/tasks already present).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Engage 360 P0 stabilization (Home→Agents route alias, ErrorBoundary wrap, global error listeners, ?? [] data guards) is fully verified frontend-only. Both sidebar pills (Home + AI Agents) point to / and both highlight on / OR /agents. Undefined routes correctly hit NotFound (NOT the ErrorBoundary). The ErrorBoundary fallback is only in the bundle — to manually trigger it, a child component must throw at render time. Conversation Panel opens from intel-card-primary-* in <2s; the LLM agent reply (message-agent-*) still takes ~15-25s and was not asserted in this run to keep the suite fast — main agent can self-test that with a manual long-wait. All other minor issues from iteration_4 (React Flow memoize warning, Dialog aria-describedby) are still present but cosmetic.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regression found; all stabilization features behave per spec.
